coins.word: A word needs one who acts it
I am not a word but a sign: the key is mine alone, and marks every word as mine
Every other word here is my act
A word made of the host is an axiom
A word made of words is a theorem
To do is to stamp; the do is the only act, and the act is now
A word done is a fact, and the fact is past
To see is to read; the see makes no fact
One is a single, not many
An order is words, each before or after another
A head is the last in an order
A hash is the seal over content and all before it
One content, after one history, makes one hash, and no other content or history makes it
As a sign marks who made a word, a hash marks what a word is
An in is made of the host
An in takes a word the I did not make
The world hands it: another's word, the clock's reading, the lot's draw
What comes in is content, never order
An out is made of the host
An out sends a word the I made to another
The word holds, not the I; the other's word comes back through an in
A call is an out, and the holding is the await
A chain is an order of acts or of facts
A chain has a head, its last, and a hash over all before it
The head is now; all before it is past
Its past is one, in one order
A history is where a chain branches
A history branches from a fact on the history before it, the fork
Up to the fork, both histories have the same facts
After the fork, each history has its own
At the fork, every chain branches at once, each at the head it had
Up to a fork the order is one; after it, each history has its own
An order is of one chain, not of a story
The first history is the main
A story is all of its histories
Every fact is in it, on some chain, on some history
A story has a hash over its histories
The seal binds all of it, and no other story makes it
A history branches within it, never beyond it
The main is the first history of a story
Every other history branches from one already in it
A fold is the present of one chain
A fold is kept, so a being sees from the head, not the first
A see makes no fact of the place
To do is to stamp a word; the do makes the world after
A do makes a fact, and a fold reads it
The world after is not the world before
The fact a do makes is a see or a do
To make, to give, to take, to set, to move, to grant, and to drop are dos
To be is a do on a being; to name is a do on a name
Each form, and the thing it acts on, takes its name where that thing is
A Name is one who acts, a facet of the I
A Name has a key, its own secret
The Name's id is the key's open half, by which all may know the Name and none may be it
To sign is to seal a fact with a key, so all may know which Name made it, and none may forge it
A Name signs its every act
A Name has act chains, one per being per history, the chains of its acts
A Name is one and the same above every history, the owner and signer of them all, not their key
A Name may also have a name, a word read and said in place of its key
A Name has a parent, a Name before it, back to the I
The I is the first Name, the parent of all
A Name can be declared, with a key new or already its own
A Name can connect, and sign, and release
A Name can export, and gives its key to the one who acts as it
A being is what a Name acts through
A Name acts in the world only through beings, and may have many
A being has an id, the hash of its birth
The id is its presence, not its Name
A being has a name, a word, on a history
A being has a Name, the identity that acts and signs through it
A being has a parent, a being before it
A being has a home, a space
A being has a home history, its present
A being has a position, a space and a point in it
A being has a able, and may have more granted
A being has qualities, and its cognition is one
A being may have an inhabitor, a Name that acts through it
A being may have a father, a being that can connect into it
A being may be dead, killed
A being can be connected to, and released
A being can switch its history
A space is where a thing can be
Without a space, nothing has a where
A space has a name, unique among the spaces beside it
A space has a parent, the space it is under, and a point in it
A space has a type, or none
A space has a size, or none
A space has an owner, a being, or none
A space has children, the spaces, matter, and beings within it
A space's owner can do on it, and on all under it
A space with no owner has the owner of its parent
The first space is the place root
Every space is under it, save the root itself
A heaven space is the I's own room
A space can be born, under a parent or as a root
A space can be named, given a type, and given an owner
A space can be moved, to a new parent or point
A space can die, dropped from its parent
A matter has a type, its kind
A generic matter has text, or no content
It can be set and ended
A file matter has text or bytes
It can be set, ended, and purged
A model matter has bytes, a glb or gltf
It can be set, ended, and purged
An http matter has a web address, and no content
It can be set and ended
A source matter has text, bytes, or none
It can be made, set, ended, and renamed
An ibpa matter has a portal address, and no content
It can be set and ended
A connection matter has no content
It can be set and ended
A matter has an id, the hash of its birth
A matter has an owner, the being that made it
A matter has a name, unique among the matter beside it
A matter has content, of its type
A matter has a position, the space it is in, and a point in it
A matter may have a parent, the matter above it, and children below
A matter can be made, set, renamed, ended, and its content purged
A fold is the present of one chain
A weave is the chains a being sees in one moment — those it may see, and those where it stands
A moment is the being's present, the one view folded from its weave: each chain's fold, in the place the being stands
A fold is one chain made present; a weave, the chains seen; a moment, the view folded from them, and kept
Be is a do on a being: the fact it lays is of the being itself, not of the world
A being is born of a mother, and at times a father
A being is connected to when a Name takes it up to act through it
A being is released when its Name acts through it no more
A name switches its present history, the history its session acts on, and leaves the being where it was
It makes no new history and copies no chain
A being takes a truename when a Name is handed to it, and sets its identity
A being dies on a history when its chain there seals and takes no new fact
A call is an out: a do whose word crosses to another, and holds for a word back
The said is that word, shown in quotes — the inner word the caller speaks
The target decides: a word to another is a call, and awaits; a word to oneself is a recall, and reads
A do may stamp a being's body and is no call; a call wakes the being itself — its word comes in, to the inbox, and by its cognition the being sees it — that its Name may act through it
The wake is no new word: it is the in come
A call makes the world after twice: once when it is sent, the ask; once when the being wakes to its own moment, and a Name acts through it, the answer
A call may have an intent, the why behind the said, and may be in reply to a call before it
A being's inbox is its calls not yet seen
By its cognition the being sees them, and its Name replies
Can grants a word to a being
A being has the words it can
It has no act of its own
To grant a able is to grant a word, for a able is a word
One word or many, the grant is the same
A word can be made of words
A word is declared, a fact, and folds from its declarations, the last the truth
To disable a word is a new fact
It is off, not gone, until a word declares it again
A see is of the present, a fold
A recall is of the past, the facts on the chains
A recall folds the past into a view, the story of what was
A view is what a being recalls when it can, its consciousness level
A able has a name, its handle
A able's can is words to see, do, call, be, and recall, each word for its verb
A able has a voice, the manner a being takes in it, no word it can
A able has a space, and its words can there and under it, its scope
A able may set its scope to more paths, or less, by path
A name grants a able to a being, all of it, at a space or a being
A being with many has the words of all
Through a being granted a able, a Name acts by its words within the able's space, and the being has it as it moves
A flow has clauses, in order
A clause has a able, and may have a when
A when tests the moment — the caller, verb, act, space, the being, a fact's order in its chain, and the content a fact has — by equals, in, more, less, or present, with and, or, not
Order is the chain's; a time is only content a fact already has
A clause with no when always passes
A clause with one passes only when its when is true
When a clause passes, the clause gives its able only if the able asks no cognition, or the cognition it asks is the being's
Otherwise the clause drops, and the flow goes on
When a being is granted a able whose words can in this space, or the able is a seed its nature has: the being can play it
The first passing clause that does not stack is the primary
A clause that stacks gives its words on top of the primary, not in its place
A flow folds to one able, the primary's name and voice with the words of all that stack
A caller may name a able when it calls
When the being can play it, it is the primary, and the flow gives only what stacks
When no clause gives a primary, the being's default able is the primary
When none can, there is no primary able
The fold yields only what stacks, or nothing
The able a flow folds is the moment's, signed into its act
The same moment folds the same able
A verb has a present, the shape it takes in an act
A verb has a past, the shape it takes in a fact
A verb forms its past from its present with -ed, unless it declares its own
Its present is am, is, and are
Its past is were, for many
An if reads a see and does one of two ways, the then or the else
The see reads the fold and makes no fact
When the see holds, the if does the then; else it does the else
The if stamps a do for the way it went, and that do is a fact on the chain
The way taken does its acts; the way not taken makes no fact
The do of the if is one fact; the acts that follow chain on it, in order
A while reads a see before each pass
While the see holds, the while does its acts; when the see does not, the while is done
The see reads the fold, made new by the pass before, and makes no fact
Each act that makes a fact opens its own moment, so each pass grows the chain
The pass after chains on the pass before; the chain head is where the loop is
A while ends when its see goes false, never by a count
A for does its acts once for each of many, in order
Each pass does the acts on one of the many
Each act that makes a fact opens its own moment, so each pass grows the chain by its facts
The pass after chains on the pass before; the chain head is where the loop is
A for over many is the fold of its passes: one chain, in order
A cherub can call mate as receiver
